title: stenotis arenaria
intro: Stenotis arenaria, also known as Cat's Throat, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Stenotis arenaria include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Stenotis arenaria can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, making it a versatile herb in traditional medicine.
